name: Earthing Calculator
seo_description: Calculate r_pica_ohm, picas_necesarias with our free earthing (grounding) calculator. Just enter resistividad_ohm_m, strength_max_ohm, tipo_pica and get resu
example_label: Calculate earthing resistance for a 2m rod in 100 ohm/m soil.

range_hints.resistividad_ohm_m: Suelo húmedo: 50-200 ΩÂ·m, Seco: 200-500 ΩÂ·m, Rocoso: >500 ΩÂ·m
range_hints.resistencia_max_ohm: Vivienda: <10 Ω, Industrial: <5 Ω, Hospitalaria: <1 Ω

result_context: Con resistividad {resistividad_ohm_m} Ω·m and pica {tipo_pica} estima resistance of {strength_ohm} Ω. ¿Cumple? {cumple}. Number of picas necesarias: {picas_ud}.
steps: Calculate resistance of a pica: (100 × 0.366) ÷ 2 = 18.3 Ω
Verify: 18.3 Ω > 10 Ω (no cumple with a pica)
Calculate picas necesarias: 18.3 Ω ÷ 10 Ω = 1.83 → 2 picas
Con 2 picas in paralelo: 18.3 Ω ÷ 2 = 9.15 Ω ✓ (cumple)
mistakes: Not Measure resistividad real of the floor antes of design
Enterrar picas in floor seco (best in zone húmeda)
Not conectar todas The masas to the same system of tierra
description: Earthing rod sizing based on soil resistivity and rod length.
rc: The voltage drop of {caida}% over {distancia} m is within acceptable limits for this circuit type.
el: Voltage drop check for a 50 m cable carrying 16 A at 230 V
desc: Calculate earth rods and conductor by soil resistivity.
